creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text:
I installed zh_TW (LANG_TW) language pack from www/firefox-i18n port. However, Firefox refused to load it and the following message was showed on about:addons page:

Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) Language Pack could not be verified for use in Firefox and has been disabled.

If I manually downloaded the language pack from https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/traditional-chinese-zh-tw-l/, it could work properly.
